description: 力量感强，辨识度极高。对角线楔形、旋转文字、几何crescendo。
base_style_prompt: Soviet Constructivism style. Revolutionary red (#CC0000) 40%, black (#1A1A1A) 25%, cream (#F5E6D3) 30%. Diagonal wedge composition from lower-left to upper-right. All text rotated 15-30 degrees — no horizontal lines. Geometric shapes represent progression from small to large (visual crescendo). Pure color fills with sharp edges, NO gradients. Three-color limitation creates power.
